value_chain_position: Manufactures single-use cardiovascular and endoscopy procedural devices (catheters, balloons, access systems); sells consumables per procedure to hospitals and ASCs.
relative_comps: Merit Medical sits in the mid-tier of cardiovascular single-use devices — growing through geographic expansion and portfolio breadth rather than platform lock-in. Its 10% revenue CAGR and consistent FCF generation are solid but not differentiated against larger peers like BSX which have wider distribution and R&D firepower. Load-bearing score of 3 reflects moderate switching costs (procedural familiarity, physician preference) but no dominant platform position. Versus Teleflex and AngioDynamics, MMSI trades at a slight premium given faster growth.
